underlying_goal: Add naming convention guards to the penalty workflow, then run all scraping/update scripts end-to-end to refresh Google Sheets, database, and the live data-setpiecetakers website
friction_detail: The penalty guard initially failed because scraped names were canonical values not map keys, and multiple missing club name mappings had to be iteratively fixed across corners/penalties.
brief_summary: User asked to add a naming guard to the penalty workflow then run the full scrape-to-deploy pipeline; Claude built the guard and executed the pipeline, fixing several club name mapping issues along the way, achieving a full data refresh.
